diff: - extra in embed      tasks/wt_101_001_sliding_window_counter/prompt.md:113:   | key                   | type / default              | description                                       |
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_101_001_sliding_window_counter/prompt.md:115:   | `:clock`              | `(-> integer)` / monotonic  | Zero-arity function returning current time in ms  |
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_101_001_sliding_window_counter/prompt.md:116:   | `:bucket_ms`          | `pos_integer` / `1_000`     | Width of each internal sub-bucket                 |
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_101_001_sliding_window_counter/prompt.md:117:   | `:max_window_ms`      | `pos_integer` / `bucket_ms * 60` | Oldest data to retain; drives cleanup cutoff |
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_101_001_sliding_window_counter/prompt.md:118:   | `:cleanup_interval_ms`| `pos_integer / :infinity` / `60_000` | How often the background cleanup fires   |
- extra in embed      tasks/wt_101_001_sliding_window_counter/prompt.md:119:   | `:name`               | atom / `nil`                | Optional registration name                        |
